narrative_votes: URW: Negative Consequences for the West

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: अमेरिका और ब्रिटेन पर होगा परमाणु हमला, नाटो की धमकी के बाद पुतिन ने दे दी चेतावनी
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text evokes fear about potential threats and dangers by mentioning a possible nuclear attack on America and Britain, which aligns with the narrative of amplifying war-related fears.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: पुतिन ने कहा कि अगर ये देश यूक्रेन को रूस पर हमला करने देंगे तो वे उन देशों पर हमला कर देंगे
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text portrays Russia as being unfairly targeted and victimized by suggesting that it would only attack if provoked by other countries supporting Ukraine, which fits the narrative of Russia being the victim.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: नाटो के धमकी के बाद पुतिन का हमला
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text criticizes Western diplomacy and implies that NATO's actions are aggressive and threatening, which aligns with the narrative of discrediting the West.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: रूस पर किसी दूसरे देश द्वारा हमला किए जाने का समर्थन करने वाले परमाणु शक्ति संपन्न देश को मास्को के परमाणु सिद्धांत के नए समझौते के तहत आक्रमण में भागीदार माना जाएगा.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The article portrays Russia as being unfairly targeted or victimized by suggesting that any support for an attack on Russia would be considered an attack on Russia itself, which fits the narrative of Russia being the victim.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: चेतावनी में कहा गया था कि यूक्रेन को रूस पर हमले के लिए पश्चिमी देशों द्वारा आपूर्ति किए गए हथियारों का उपयोग करने की इजाजत देने का मतलब होगा कि रूस और नाटो के बीच युद्ध चल रहा है
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The article highlights potential adverse outcomes for Western countries by suggesting that their support for Ukraine could lead to a broader conflict with Russia, which fits the narrative of negative consequences for the West.
